channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA postpones Saturday's Lakers-Spurs, Clippers-Hornets games in Southern California due to wildfires
item.description: The NBA announced that Saturday's home games for both the Los Angeles Lakers and Los Angeles Clippers have been postponed as the wildfires sweep through Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hayton scores dramatic goal in 2-1 win over San Jose
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Barrett Hayton scored with 1:32 remaining in regulation to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 win against the San Jose Sharks at Delta Center on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bill McCartney, who coached Colorado to its only football national championship in 1990, has died
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Bill McCartney, who coached Colorado to its only football national championship in 1990, has died. He was 84. The charismatic figure known as Coach Mac died Friday night “after a courageous journey with dementia,” according to a family statement.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get ready for the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: When does the Australian Open start? The time in Melbourne
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ohio State's late scoop-and-score catapults Buckeyes to national championship over Texas
item.description: Jack Sawyer's 82-yard scoop and score made him an Ohio State legend and helped the Buckeyes to a win over Texas to go to the national championship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State, Notre Dame to meet for title, long after upset losses
item.description: Two upset losses stood out among the rest in college football this season. Notre Dame suffered one of them. Ohio State the other. In years past, those losses might have been enough to knock both teams out of the hunt for a national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Fishburn and Denny McCarthy share Sony Open lead
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Patrick Fishburn found some early momentum and Denny McCarthy overcame a sluggish start Friday, both winding up in the same spot — a share of the lead in the Sony Open going into what figures to be a wide-open weekend at Waialae.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Maryland beats No. 22 UCLA 79-61; Bruins coach Cronin ejected with 5:11 remaining
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Ja'Kobi Gillespie scored 27 points and Maryland topped No. 22 UCLA 79-61 on Friday night after Bruins coach Mick Cronin was ejected with 5:11 remaining.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Another rough night for UCLA coach Mick Cronin: This time his ire was directed at the officials
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Three days after ripping his team following a home loss to Michigan, UCLA coach Mick Cronin turned his disdain toward the officials.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 76ers continue to struggle with Joel Embiid out again
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Without a healthy Joel Embiid, the 76ers were never expected to contend for an NBA title.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers coach JJ Redick, Kentucky Derby-winning jockey Mario Gutierrez lose their homes in wildfires
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — As the punishing winds that fueled the deadly fires in the Los Angeles region have eased, members of the sports community are beginning to deal with the fallout.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Sox manager Alex Cora says he skipped Trump White House visit to show support for Puerto Rico
item.description: Boston Red Sox manager Alex Cora recently opened up on why he skipped a trip to the Trump White House after leading his team to the 2018 World Series title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz go cold in 97-92 loss to the Heat
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz just can't seem to find a way to be able to close out games at home this season. Tyler Herro scored 23 points and Jaime Jaquez had 20, including five in the final 1:03, to lead the Miami Heat to a 97-92 victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Google Trends: Nearly every US state is searching the Broncos over the Bills
item.description: We looked at Google Trends statistics to see whether the Broncos or the Bills were the talk of the country – and one team won by a landslide.
item.dc:creator: Morgan Whitley, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox sign former Seattle Mariners infielder
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox signed free agent infielder Josh Rojas Wednesday, according to a press release from the team. The White Sox agreed to terms on a one-year, $3.5-million contract with Rojas. Rojas spent the 2024 season with the Seattle Mariners, hitting .225/.304/.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave names Jonas Eidevall as new head coach
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has named Jonas Eidevall as its new head coach. Eidevall, a native of Sweden, has more than a decade of experience as a head coach and has led Arsenal Women to three consecutive top-three finishes in the Women's Super League.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to trade Gavin Lux to Reds: report
item.description: The post World Series shakeup continues in Los Angeles, as the Dodgers are poised to trade starting second-baseman Gavin Lux to the Cincinnati Reds. As reported by ESPN's Jeff Passan, the Dodgers will send Lux to the Reds in exchange for a future draft pick and outfield prospect Mike Sirota.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Allstate CEO criticized for comments following New Orleans attack
item.description: NewsNation media contributor Colby Hall believes Wilson's intentions behind his message were good but says it was ultimately "tone deaf.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Lawsuit alleges Fox Sports ex-host harassed hairstylist and offered her $1.5M for sex
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A woman who worked as a hairstylist for Fox Sports alleges in a lawsuit that former host Skip Bayless made repeated, unwanted advances toward her — including an offer of $1.5 million to have sex with him.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mariota leads playoff-bound Commanders to 23-19 win over Cowboys after replacing Daniels
item.description: Marcus Mariota threw a 5-yard touchdown pass to Terry McLaurin with 3 seconds left, lifting Washington to a 23-19 victory over the Dallas Cowboys on Sunday and clinching the sixth seed in the NFC playoffs for the Commanders.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Wave FC announces termination of contract for midfielder Emily van Egmond
item.description: San Diego Wave FC announced Friday that midfielder Emily van Egmond and the club have mutually agreed to terminate her contract.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5
